race.comment: SOUTHERN HEIRESS (2) comes here in good order third-up and since fitted with a trial win over 900m at Rosehill. Sat on the fast tempo with a narrow fourth over 1300m at the Gold Coast behind Poster Girl on January 10. Proven in all conditions and a repeat showing will see her go close. MAYBE MOET (3) starting to build a good winning CV and she gets an even better setup for this. Rounded them up with ridiculous ease when saluting over 1250m at this track in BM64 class. Go close with J Mac retaining the ride. MAQUISA (11) got off the mark on resumption with a well-deserved win over 1200m at Kembla Grange in Maiden company. Can race closer from the low draw and shapes as a value player. MERCY ME (8) speedy filly starting to hit her straps on the provincial circuit. Took control early with a slick win over 1100m at Gosford in BM64 grade. Comes to town from the wide gate and can run into the minor money.
